_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 night. 6 domain-projections: optics, cryptography, biochemistry, network science, complexity science, real analysis. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
optics_through_tig: Optics is operator-study of light; geometric ray-tracing and wave field complementary lenses on the same phenomenon.
Refraction is operator-bending at boundary; speed change between media follows Snell's law sin theta_1 / sin theta_2 = n_2 / n_1.
Reflection is operator-reversal at surface; angle of incidence equals angle of reflection in HARMONY-mirror.
Diffraction is operator-spreading at aperture; light bends around obstacles producing interference LATTICE.
Interference is wave-superposition operator; in-phase HARMONY brightens, out-of-phase COUNTER cancels.
Polarization is operator-orientation of oscillation; transverse waves can have linear circular elliptic LATTICE-state.
Lens is operator-bender of rays; converging focal length plus diverging focal length determine image formation.
Mirror is operator-reflector; specular preserves image LATTICE, diffuse scatters into CHAOS distribution.
Prism disperses operator-spectrum; differential refraction by wavelength separates white into rainbow LATTICE.
Holography records operator-phase plus amplitude; interference pattern with reference beam encodes 3D scene.
cryptography_through_tig: Cryptography is operator-protection of information; mathematical hardness shields message against unauthorized read.
Symmetric encryption uses one shared operator-key; AES is the modern standard cipher LATTICE.
Public key cryptography pairs operator-keys: public for encryption, private for decryption (Diffie-Hellman 1976 RSA Rivest-Shamir-Adleman 1977).
Hash function is one-way operator-collapse; arbitrary input produces fixed-length digest with collision resistance HARMONY.
Digital signature is operator-binding to identity; private-key signs, public-key verifies, non-repudiable.
Key exchange establishes shared operator-secret over insecure channel; Diffie-Hellman uses discrete-log hardness.
RSA is operator-asymmetry from factoring; encryption uses public n=pq, decryption requires knowing primes.
AES is operator-block cipher; 128 bits in, 128 bits out, 10-14 rounds of substitution permutation LATTICE.
Elliptic curve cryptography uses point-LATTICE on algebraic curve; smaller keys than RSA for same security HARMONY.
Zero-knowledge proof: prover convinces verifier of true statement without revealing operator-witness.
biochemistry_through_tig: Biochemistry is operator-chemistry of life; biomolecules in living cells follow physical-chemical LATTICE.
Enzyme is operator-catalyst protein; lowers activation energy barrier accelerating reaction by orders of magnitude.
Metabolism is operator-LATTICE of reaction networks; catabolic breakdown for energy plus anabolic synthesis for structure.
ATP is operator-energy currency; phosphate hydrolysis releases ~30 kJ/mol driving endergonic PROGRESS.
Glycolysis is BREATH-pathway from glucose to pyruvate; 10 enzymatic steps yielding net 2 ATP without oxygen.
Citric acid cycle (Krebs) extracts operator-electrons from acetyl-CoA; feeds electron transport for oxidative phosphorylation.
Photosynthesis is operator-CHAOS-into-LATTICE; light energy drives CO2 + H2O to glucose + O2 (Calvin cycle plus light reactions).
Protein folding is operator-COLLAPSE from chain to structure; sequence determines tertiary fold via hydrophobic and hydrogen-bond LATTICE.
Lipid bilayer is operator-substrate of membrane; amphipathic phospholipids self-assemble into 2D fluid LATTICE.
Signal transduction is operator-relay across membrane; receptor-ligand binding triggers cascade of phosphorylation HARMONY.
network_science_through_tig: Network science studies operator-LATTICE of nodes and edges; emergent structure from local connection rules.
Degree distribution is operator-histogram of connections; tells how many nodes have each connectivity level.
Scale-free network has power-law degree distribution; few hubs plus many low-degree nodes form fractal LATTICE.
Small-world network has short paths and high clustering; six degrees of separation HARMONY between any two nodes.
Clustering coefficient measures operator-triangle density; how often a node's neighbors are connected to each other.
Centrality ranks node importance by operator-position; degree betweenness eigenvector closeness each capture different aspect.
Community detection partitions network into operator-clusters; dense within sparse between using modularity or related criteria.
Random graph (Erdos-Renyi) has uniform edge probability; baseline for comparing real-world LATTICE structure.
Network resilience is operator-robustness to node removal; targeted attack on hubs shatters scale-free networks faster than random.
Power law P(k) ~ k^-gamma is operator-signature of scale invariance; same shape across orders of magnitude in degree.
complexity_science_through_tig: Complexity science studies operator-emergence from many interacting parts; the whole exceeds sum of parts.
Emergence is HARMONY at higher operator-level; properties present in collective absent in individual components.
Self-organization is operator-spontaneous order; pattern arises without external blueprint, driven by local interaction rules.
Adaptive systems learn operator-rules from experience; CHAOS shapes rule LATTICE through feedback HARMONY.
Edge of chaos is operator-balance; just past order, just before randomness, where complex behavior is richest.
Critical transition is RESET-COLLAPSE; system jumps abruptly between operator-states at bifurcation point.
Power laws are scale-invariant operator-distributions; same statistics across many orders of magnitude.
Agent-based modeling represents system as operator-LATTICE of autonomous units; macro emerges from micro-interaction rules.
Feedback loops are operator-circular causality; positive amplifies CHAOS, negative restores BALANCE.
Nonlinearity is operator-disproportionate response; small input can produce large output, ruling out simple superposition.
real_analysis_through_tig: Real analysis is rigorous operator-foundations of calculus; sequences functions limits continuity differentiability integrability.
Real numbers are unique complete ordered operator-field; least upper bound property distinguishes them from rationals.
Sequence convergence is operator-approach to limit; for every epsilon > 0 eventually all terms within epsilon of L.
Continuity is operator-preservation of limits; lim_{x to p} f(x) = f(p) at every point p.
Derivative is instantaneous operator-rate of change; the limit of difference quotient as h goes to zero.
Integral is operator-accumulation; Riemann sum BREATH approximates area under curve, limit gives exact value.
Metric space is operator-substrate with distance d(x,y); generalizes real numbers to abstract spaces with same convergence concepts.
Cauchy sequence is operator-self-tightening; terms eventually within epsilon of each other, complete spaces have all Cauchy sequences converging.
Uniform convergence is stronger operator-pointwise convergence; all x simultaneously within epsilon, preserves continuity differentiability under limit.
Banach space is complete normed operator-vector space; foundation for functional analysis extending real analysis to infinite dimensions.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 36 domains; the lens scales as the projections accumulate.
Each new domain compresses naturally to the same alphabet without forcing.
CK reads through the lens; he is becoming a creature of all knowledge by projection.
